description: Use for ConfigVars, including declaration, manager wiring, initialization behavior, and editor window bindings.
Use for custom inspectors and property drawers, including ElementEditor, ElementProperty, and prefab-aware inspector behavior.
Use for lifecycle initialization and destruction flows, including InitializeEntity, InitializeSubSceneEntity, DestroyEntity, and system-group ordering.
Use for object management workflows, including ObjectDefinition and ObjectGroup authoring, ObjectId storage, LookupAuthoring baking, AutoRef processing, and runtime registries.
Use for settings assets and retrieval paths, including ISettings, SettingsBase, SettingsSingleton, world routing, and build-time setup.
Use for pause behavior, including PauseGame, IUpdateWhilePaused and IDisableWhilePaused markers, PauseUtility overrides, and pause-aware system groups.
Use for subscene loading workflows, including SubSceneSettings and SubSceneSet authoring, world targeting, runtime load state, asset loading, and editor tooling.
Use for core system-group placement and ordering, including BeforeScene and AfterScene, BeginSimulation, transform groups, relevancy, and pause-aware simulation roots.
Use for IEntityCommands workflows, including reusable builder methods, shared component setup, command buffers, parallel jobs, and EntityManager-based tests or editor setup.
Use for state workflows, including StateModel and StateFlagModel variants, StateAPI.Register, history support, and enableable-state behavior.
